observations.summary: The words are metaphorically described as stones dropped into still water, emphasizing their weight and the irreversible impact they have on the person.

evidence.quote: The words settled into him like stones dropped into still water, sinking before he could stop them.

observations.notes: This metaphor conveys the heaviness and permanence of the words' effect.
